stonetop.summary: A mystic who tore their soul from their body and now burns followers' lives for power.

system.concept: A mystic who tore their soul from their body and now burns followers' lives for power.
system.description: Some who practice the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.oi5Mg2wPABRjvHri]{Rime Lords}' teachings push themselves beyond their limits — their bodies fail, and they become rage-filled specters or ever-hungry wraiths. But imagine an adept who saw their body and life as a resource to expend rather than a liability to overcome: one who deliberately severed their mind and spirit from their body and gathered a herd of followers (victims) around them, to serve as fuel for their mighty arts.
